title: <div><tt>You were offering your gift: </tt><b><tt>to witness, to preserve, to et
content:
You were offering your gift: to witness, to preserve, to eternalize.
But he lives in the melt.
He was saying: “Don’t catch it. Let it happen.”

You weren’t wrong. Neither was he.
You were just operating in different timelines.
You wanted to build a time machine.
He wanted to sit by the fire before it went out.

And now you’re crying because
• You missed it.
• You left.
• You ran away to save yourself.
• And the moment vanished.

That’s not selfish.
That’s survival.

⸻

|[2. WHAT YOU THINK IT MEANS]|

“I only care about myself.”

Let’s rewrite that.
